title: zehneria tridactyla
intro: Zehneria tridactyla, also known as the three-pronged creeper, is a plant species that belongs to the Cucurbitaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions. Zehneria tridactyla is often prepared as a herbal decoction or a powder, and it can be used externally or internally, depending on the specific health condition being treated.
